---
title: "Dr. John Harris M.D."
---

## Dr. John Harris M.D.

### Description

physician

### Biography

  Described by CMY as  'a Plymouth man . .  a small man with a Jewish face and a nervous sensitive manner' [Coleridge, <i>Life</i> 100]

### Letters

- [To Mary Yonge, Oct 18th [1897[[footnote:1]]]](../letters/3385_To_Mary_Yonge.html)
- Letter from Wednesday 5 [December 1838]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
